modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into MyUSD Portal due to certificate errors.

full_description_text:  
The user attempted to access the MyUSD Portal from their home computer but encountered login issues. They received multiple error messages indicating that the connection is not private, specifically citing certificate date and common name errors. This prevented successful authentication to the portal.
short_description: Unable to log into MyUSD Portal due to certificate errors.
description: The user attempted to access the MyUSD Portal from their home computer but encountered login issues.
